polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,250 by December 31, 2026?
Will Bitcoin dip to $57,500 in July?

polymarket_summary.summary: Bullish: Market sentiment is overwhelmingly positive regarding Bitcoin's short-term trajectory, with an 80% probability of reaching $67,500 in July. While higher targets like $75,000 (6%) and $72,500 (15%) see less conviction, the low 4% probability of a dip to $57,500 reinforces upward momentum. Conversely, Ethereum sentiment remains cautious, as only 21% of traders expect a significant dip to $1,250 by late 2026, suggesting long-term stability for the asset.
